author: 1wJG
content: Completed: Phase 2 DatasetMeta dataclass. New module src/atdata/dataset_meta.py with DatasetMeta and _resolve_meta(). Updated Index.insert_dataset, Index.write_samples, all DatasetPublisher.publish* methods, and _AtmosphereBackend to accept meta= kwarg. 23 new tests, full suite green (1758 passed). PR #86 to develop.
